County Chamber Collective

A group of musicians bringing small ensemble, accessible music to Prince Edward County

Find Out More

We've got what you need!

The County Chamber Collective provides the perfect soundtrack for whatever you're looking for. Whether a walk down the aisle, an energetic and spirited performance, or an educational playground, we work with you to bring your vision to life. We blend classical mastery with contemporary flair to create an atmosphere that feels both timeless and uniquely yours.

Get Started!

Our Services

Custom Performances

We play what you want to hear! We offer one-on-one consults to customize your experience.

Wedding Packages Available

We can provide duos, trios, or full quartets for your next event!

Educational Opportunities

Education focused performances are available! Learn more in an engaging setting.

Professionalism

Our musicians take care of all setup and logistics! Sit back and enjoy the music.

Listen to us play!


  • Looking for love? Sounds Perfect (featuring Beyonce)

  • If you're a nerd this must be Concerning Hobbits!

  • What's the hottest party theme?
    Golden! (we know your kids love it)

Are you a musician in the greater Quinte area and want to join us?

Contact Us!

Let's Get In Touch!

Ready to start your next project with us? Reach out to one of our members or via Instagram (@countychambercollective) and we will can get your projects rolling!
